code:
import io
import string

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let words = string.split_whitespace(line)
mut result = ""
mut i = 0
let n = words.len()
while i < n
  let word = match words.get(i)
  when Some(w)
    w
  when None
    ""
  end
  let transformed = match string.byte_at(word, 0)
  when Some(b)
    if b >= 97 and b <= 122
      let upper_b = b - 32
      let rest = string.substring(word, 1, string.len(word))
      "#{string.from_byte(upper_b)}#{rest}"
    else
      word
    end
  when None
    word
  end
  if i == 0
    result = transformed
  else
    result = "#{result} #{transformed}"
  end
  i = i + 1
end

println(result)
